code:
%%{FinTech_TransactionQueue}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_FraudDetection] --> Invited: UserInvitedEvent
    Invited --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> PendingActivation: UserRegisteredEvent
    PendingActivation --> Active: UserActivatedEvent
    Active --> Suspended: UserSuspendedEvent
    Suspended --> Active: UserUnsuspendedEvent
    Active --> Deactivated: UserDeactivatedEvent
    Deactivated --> Active: UserReactivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Suspended --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent
    Deactivated --> Archived: UserArchivedEvent

    %% State styling with classes
    classDef invitedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef pendingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef suspendedState fill:#D35400,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef deactivatedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#333,color:white
    classDef archivedState fill:#34495E,stroke:#333,color:white

    class Invited invitedState
    class PendingActivation pendingState
    class Active activeState
    class Suspended suspendedState
    class Deactivated deactivatedState
    class Archived archivedState

    %% Notes
    note right of Invited
        User has been invited but has not registered
    end note

    note right of PendingActivation
        User has registered but not activated their account
    end note

    note right of Active
        User has an active account and can access all features
    end note

    note right of Suspended
        User account has been temporarily suspended
        by an administrator
    end note

    note right of Deactivated
        User has voluntarily deactivated their account
    end note

    note right of Archived
        User account has been archived (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
    end note
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_PaymentGateway设计一个用户生命周期状态机。用户旅程从收到邀请开始，经过注册、激活，最终可能进入停用或归档。关键是要有FraudDetection和TransactionQueue两个系统触发状态变更。
明白了。我梳理一下：起始状态是Invited，用户注册后进入PendingActivation——这里是由FraudDetection还是TransactionQueue触发？另外Suspended和Deactivated都能回到Active吗？
两个系统都能触发注册事件到PendingActivation。Suspended可以解封回到Active，Deactivated也可以由用户主动重新激活。但Archived是终态，一旦进入就不能恢复。
好的，我已经画出了主线：Invited→PendingActivation→Active，以及Active分出的三条支路。Suspended、Deactivated、Active都能进入Archived。现在需要给每个状态加说明注释吗？
需要注释，特别是区分清楚：Invited是已邀请未注册，PendingActivation是已注册未激活，Suspended是管理员临时封禁，Deactivated是用户自愿停用。另外用颜色区分状态优先级——Active用绿色，Suspended用橙色警示。
颜色方案已应用：Active绿色，PendingActivation黄色，Suspended橙色，Deactivated和Invited灰色，Archived深蓝。注释也加好了。我注意到Suspended和Deactivated都能到Archived，但Suspended不能直接到Deactivated？

对，Suspended和Deactivated是互斥的，不能互相转换。封禁的用户必须先解封成Active，才能再自愿停用。最后确认一下事件命名：UserInvitedEvent、UserRegisteredEvent、UserActivatedEvent、UserSuspendedEvent、UserUnsuspendedEvent、UserDeactivatedEvent、UserReactivatedEvent、UserArchivedEvent。
全部核对完毕。状态机完整覆盖了用户从邀请邀请到最终归档的全生命周期，两个触发系统FraudDetection和TransactionQueue都正确标注，颜色编码和注释也符合要求。
